message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in self_analyzer.zig

Long-term fix: Made exprUsesFirstParamRaw and exprUsesFirstParamWithContext
comprehensive for all expression types.

exprUsesFirstParamRaw added:
- subscript slice range handling
- genexp, dict, fstring, starred

exprUsesFirstParamWithContext added:
- keyword_args in calls
- genexp, fstring, starred

This ensures self/first-param usage detection works correctly with
f-strings, generators, dicts, and complex expressions.
